ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated October 29, 2018 is admitted to probate. Mirna Bonilla Ortiz is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Continued To May-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
